description: Ready-to-mix cereal-pulse combination (Rice:Wheat:Blackgram:Sugar 1:1:1:2)
preparation: Roasted and powdered components mixed in specific ratio.

description: WHO starter formula for stabilization phase of SAM management.
WHO catch-up formula for rehabilitation phase of SAM management.
Rehydration Solution for Malnutrition; specifically modified ORS for children with SAM.
Milk fortified with sugar and oil (1/2 glass milk + 1 tsp sugar + 1/2 tsp oil).
Commercial multivitamin preparation for infants.

clinical_note: Reference protein with highest biological value (BV=100).

description: Paediatric maintenance solution with 5% dextrose.
IV fluid for enteric loss with 5% dextrose.
IV fluid for gastric loss with 5% dextrose.
Elemental enteral diet; iso-osmolar (275-295 mOsm/L).
Special formula for preterm and low birth weight infants.
Amino acid infusion for parenteral nutrition.
Intravenous fat emulsion (10% or 20% soyabean oil).
Therapeutic Level 3 diet for infants with severe persistent diarrhoea and disaccharide malabsorption.
Lactose-free soya protein isolate formula.
Lactose-free, sucrose-free casein formula with Medium Chain Triglycerides (MCT).

composition: Rice:Wheat:Black Gram:Sugar in 1:1:1:2 ratio (Preroasted and powdered).
preparation: 30g (6 rounded teaspoons) made into semisolid paste with hot water provides 125 Cal and 2.5g protein.

description: Amylase Rich Food (ARF) made by germinating, drying, and roasting ragi (Finger Millet).
usage: Can be added to other recipes towards the end of cooking to liquefy thick porridges.

description: Traditional supplementary food made of roasted wheat atta, jaggery, and ghee/oil.
preparation: Roast wheat in ghee until light brown, then add jaggery solution.

description: High-energy complementary food mix.
preparation: Mash banana, add roasted/ground nuts and jaggery into a smooth paste.

description: Cereal-pulse combination supplementary food.
composition: Wheat flour (50g), Green gram dal (50g), Sugar (100g), Oil (2 tbsp).
